message:
feat(tui): expand help overlay and add test infrastructure

Help Overlay Improvements (widgets.rs):
- Increase help overlay height from 20 to 34 lines for full content
- Add Scrolling section: PgUp/PgDn, g (top), G (bottom/auto-scroll)
- Add Backspace shortcut for go back / close log view
- Add Search & Filter section with /, Enter, Esc shortcuts
- Clarify d/e shortcuts are for Workers panel specifically
- Add F1 as alternative help key alongside ?
- Add Ctrl+C force quit documentation

Test Infrastructure:
- test_data.rs: Test fixtures for TUI testing
- test_harness.rs: Test harness utilities for widget testing
- Add test_help_overlay_contains_filter_shortcut() test

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
